name: Descript
tagline: Edit audio and video by editing the transcript  - the all-in-one AI media editor
description: Descript revolutionizes audio and video editing with its text-based approach: you edit the transcript and the video follows. Remove filler words (um, uh) with a click, clone your voice for corrections, remove background noise, and publish directly to YouTube or podcast platforms. It's the tool of choice for podcasters, YouTubers, and course creators.
cons: Voice clone less realistic than ElevenLabs
bestFor: Podcasters and video creators editing their recordings
keyStrength: Edit video by editing the text transcript
